CREATE VIEW cat AS SELECT CategoryID, description FROM categories;
CREATE VIEW products AS SELECT ProductName, CategoryID FROM product_details;
SELECT xml_view_schema('cat', 'root') AS schema1, xml_view_schema('products', 'rootProducts') AS schema2;
CREATE VIEW complex_view AS SELECT c.CategoryID, p.ProductName FROM categories c JOIN product_details p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID;
SELECT xml_view_schema('cat', 'root') FROM (SELECT * FROM categories WHERE CategoryID IS NOT NULL) AS valid_categories;
SELECT xml_view_schema('cat', 'root') ORDER BY CategoryID DESC;
SELECT xml_view_schema('cat', 'root') WHERE CategoryID IN (SELECT DISTINCT CategoryID FROM categories);
